title: The Keeper's Trust
description: Aldric Vane has revealed himself to be a member of the Keepers - a secret society that has long watched over the Empire's hidden truths. He believes you have potential, but trust must be earned. Prove yourself by investigating the strange occurrences at Willow Dale ruins, where dark forces have been stirring.

objectives.description: Travel to the Willow Dale ruins northwest of Dalhurst
Investigate the source of the dark energy
Defeat the cultists performing the ritual
Return to Aldric Vane with evidence of what you found
